title: Starter Gender Equality
description: Gender equality for starters (and some other Pokémon)!
body:
## __Starter Gender Equality__

A small-ish tweak pack for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) that sets the gender ratios of most 7:1 gender ratio Pokémon to be equal. This includes all starters, fossils, and most gift Pokémon!

Some 7:1 gender ratios were kept for flavor. These include:
* Relicanth
* Combee
* Riolu and Lucario
* Zorua and Zoroark
* Salandit
* Kubfu and Urshifu

In addition, the sole 1:7 gender ratio line (Litleo and Pyroar) are kept for the same reason.

<details>
<summary>List of all modified Pokémon</summary>

* **Gen 1**: Bulbasaur, Ivysaur, Venusaur, Charmander, Charmeleon, Charizard, Squirtle, Wartortle, Blastoise, Eevee, Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Omanyte, Omastar, Kabuto, Kabutops, Aerodactyl, Snorlax
* **Gen 2**: Chikorita, Bayleef, Meganium, Cyndaquil, Quilava, Typhlosion, Totodile, Croconaw, Feraligatr, Togepi, Togetic, Espeon, Umbreon
* **Gen 3**: Treecko, Grovyle, Sceptile, Torchic, Combusken, Blaziken, Mudkip, Marshtomp, Swampert, Lileep, Cradily, Anorith, Armaldo
* **Gen 4**: Turtwig, Grotle, Torterra, Chimchar, Monferno, Infernape, Piplup, Prinplup, Empoleon, Cranidos, Rampardos, Shieldon, Bastiodon, Munchlax, Togekiss, Leafeon, Glaceon
* **Gen 5**: Snivy, Servine, Serperior, Tepig, Pignite, Emboar, Oshawott, Dewott, Samurott, Pansage, Simisage, Pansear, Simisear, Panpour, Simipour, Tirtouga, Carracosta, Archen, Archeops
* **Gen 6**: Chespin, Quilladin, Chesnaught, Fennekin, Braixen, Delphox, Froakie, Frogadier, Greninja, Tyrunt, Tyrantrum, Amaura, Aurorus, Sylveon
* **Gen 7**: Rowlet, Dartrix, Decidueye, Litten, Torracat, Incineroar, Popplio, Brionne, Primarina
* **Gen 8**: Grookey, Thwackey, Rillaboom, Scorbunny, Raboot, Cinderace, Sobble, Drizzile, Inteleon
* **Gen 9**: Sprigatito, Floragato, Meowscarada, Fuecoco, Crocalor, Skeledirge, Quaxly, Quaxwell, Quaquaval
</details>

This pack does __not__ add any Pokémon that are not already in the base mod, but in theory should work when these mods are implemented with other addons.

Happy catching!

_Requires Cobblemon, of course. Support can be requested over at the Official Cobblemon Discord._
